sent_simp: 指挥中心负责调度各地的救援力量。
sent_trad: 指揮中心負責調度各地的救援力量。
pinyin: Zhǐhuī zhōngxīn fùzé diàodù gè dì de jiùyuán lìliàng.
english: The command center is responsible for dispatching rescue forces from all areas.

sent_simp: 他当众被批评，觉得很下不来台。
sent_trad: 他當眾被批評，覺得很下不來台。
pinyin: Tā dāngzhòng bèi pīpíng, juéde hěn xià bu lái tái.
english: He was criticized in public and felt very embarrassed.

pinyin: Tā bàn fēn dōu bù kěn tuǒxié.
english: He won't compromise even a little bit.
